global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with game icons and promotional text.
global.main_message: Encouraging players to compete and play with friends.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Game icons
elements.description: Four simple game icons are arranged in a grid pattern at the top center, each with a circular design.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A single circular game icon is positioned in the center, featuring a minimalistic design.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: Another circular game icon is located at the top left, maintaining a consistent style with the others.

elements.label: Game icon
elements.description: A circular game icon is centered below the top icons, designed to match the overall aesthetic.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon is placed at the top left, adding detail to the overall design.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon is positioned in the center, complementing the other icons.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: Another small circular icon is located in the center, maintaining visual balance.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon is placed at the top right, contributing to the overall iconography.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon is positioned at the top right, enhancing the design's detail.

elements.label: Game title
elements.description: The title 'NeonArena' is displayed prominently at the top in bold, modern typography.

elements.label: Promotional text
elements.description: The text 'Beat your rivals Play with friends tonight' is centered below the title in a clear, inviting font.
elements.text_content: Beat your rivals Play with friends tonight

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The phrase 'Try for free' is positioned at the bottom in a bold, attention-grabbing style.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, bright and playful, game title, promotional text, call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by body text in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: NeonArena, Beat your rivals Play with friends tonight, Try for free
